creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Is this because of the Tinderbox jail?  IBUS? is it looking for /dev/ibus?  a started daemon? 

checking for pkg-config... /usr/local/bin/pkg-config 
checking pkg-config is at least version 0.9.0... yes 
checking for IBUS... no 
configure: error: can't find ibus 
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly. 
Please report the problem to hiroto.kagotani@gmail.com [maintainer] and attach 
the "/work/a/ports/japanese/ibus-skk/work/ibus-skk-1.4.0/config.log" including 
the output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be a good idea 
to provide an overview of all packages installed on your system (e.g. an `ls 
/var/db/pkg`). 
*** Error code 1 

Stop in /a/ports/japanese/ibus-skk. 
*** Error code 1 

Stop in /a/ports/japanese/ibus-skk.
